commands.review_summary:
The PR adds catalog-backed install hints for missing configured official external plugins in config validation, updates regression tests, and records an Unreleased changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's warn-only missing plugin path emits stale/remove warnings for `plugins.entries` and `plugins.allow`, and the existing Discord test expected that stale warning. I did not run local tests in this read-only review, but the PR head and check-runs cover the intended regression path.
